[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000000 a
1 000000000 a
2 000000000 a
3 000000000 a
4 110111101 7
5 001101001 4
6 001101110 5
7 010111000 4

01 10 111111101 8
12 21 001101111 6
23 32 011111110 7
34 43 111111110 8
45 54 111011111 8
56 65 110011111 7
67 76 110101011 6
70 07 110111111 8

02 20 111111111 a
13 31 011111001 6
24 42 111111110 8
35 53 010111111 7
46 64 111011111 8
57 75 010111111 7
60 06 110111101 7 match 4
71 17 011101011 6

03 30 110111101 7 match 4
14 41 111111111 a
25 52 011111111 8
36 63 110111001 6
47 74 111111111 a
50 05 110111111 8
61 16 111101001 6
72 27 011101111 7

04 40 111111111 a
15 51 011111111 8
26 62 111101111 8
37 73 010111011 6
